scripts.db:migrate:local: mkdir -p .wrangler-config && XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.wrangler-config wrangler d1 migrations apply ls-oneup-db --local --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:prod:list: wrangler d1 migrations list ls-oneup-db --remote --config wrangler.production.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:prod: node scripts/require-prod-confirmation.mjs migrate && wrangler d1 migrations apply ls-oneup-db --remote --config wrangler.production.jsonc
scripts.deploy:prod: node scripts/require-prod-confirmation.mjs deploy && npm run build && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.production.jsonc
scripts.format: prettier --write --ignore-unknown "{src,worker,tests,migrations}/**/*" package.json tsconfig.json tailwind.config.ts vite.config.ts vitest.integration.config.ts playwright.config.ts wrangler.jsonc wrangler.production.jsonc drizzle.config.ts eslint.config.js index.html
scripts.test:integration: mkdir -p dist .wrangler-config && XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.wrangler-config vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts
scripts.ci:local: npm run crypto:run && npm run format && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts.asvs:run: npm run asvs:sync && npm run asvs:audit && npm run asvs:gate
scripts.crypto:run: npm run crypto:inventory && npm run crypto:gate
